name: Diablo Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the Monterey Jack and sharp cheddar cheeses.
2. If a spicier result is desired, add jalapeno peppers to the Monterey Jack cheese.
3. Mix Swiss or mozzarella cheese as a substitution option.
4. Make a round mound of ingredients, layering them in the order listed, starting with bean dip and ending with olives.
5. Serve with tortilla chips. Scoop from the bottom to top for a taste of all layers.
